author: Nintendo Everything
text:
RoadOut launch trailer – post-apocalyptic action RPG out on Nintendo Switch

To celebrate the game’s release, Dangen Entertainment and Rastrolabs have released a launch trailer for RoadOut. This is a post-apocalyptic mix of action RPG, rock n’ racing, and dungeon-crawling. Tons of details can be found in the following overview: RoadOut is a story-driven action RPG that combines twin stick action with rubber-burning driving mechanics. Explore a vast post-apocalyptic world in...

The post RoadOut launch trailer – post-apocalyptic action RPG out on Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Tale of Dark Lands heading to Nintendo Switch

Sometimes You today announced a partnership with Satur Entertainment to bring Tale of Dark Lands to Nintendo Switch. It’s due out on June 2, 2026. Tale of Dark Lands is a magical fantasy action RPG with a low-poly style. In the game, players will experience a story in which a brave mercenary defends a village from goblin raids, but the...

The post Tale of Dark Lands heading to Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Tactics RPG Diorama Break confirms Nintendo Switch release

After raising enough funds on Kickstarter, Studio Massimo Gauthier has confirmed plans to bring Diorama Break to Nintendo Switch. The game was able to raise about $70,000 in total. Along with funding the game itself, hitting the Kickstarter goal secured a Nintendo Switch version. Diorama Break is described as a tactics RPG in which players can talk directly to the...

The post Tactics RPG Diorama Break confirms Nintendo Switch release appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Digital Pinball: Last Gladiators coming to Nintendo Switch 2, and Switch

BeXide has announced Digital Pinball: Last Gladiators for Nintendo Switch, and Nintendo Switch 2. The title is set to release this year, with no specific date provided. Digital Pinball: Gladiators is actually a 1995 Sega Saturn game, with a mobile port in 2010. As name suggests, it is indeed digital pinball. Here’s a full description of the game: A high-quality...

The post Digital Pinball: Last Gladiators coming to Nintendo Switch 2, and Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Neptunia: Unlimited announced for Nintendo Switch 2, Switch [update: opening movie released]

March 19: Today, Compile Heart unveiled Neptunia: Unlimited, which is planned for both Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch. It’s first debuting in Japan on August 27, 2026. Expect a western release and a finalized English name later. Neptunia: Unlimited is arriving over a decade after the last mainline entry in the series. It’s also the first game in the franchise...

The post Neptunia: Unlimited announced for Nintendo Switch 2, Switch [update: opening movie released] appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

text:
Rumor: Nintendo Direct happening by mid-June

According to Giant Bomb’s Jeff Grubb, a Nintendo Direct will air by the middle of June. In other words, if true, a presentation should be expected sometime within the next few weeks. Grubb shared that tidbit of information during the latest Giant Bombcast episode. He doesn’t currently have an answer as to whether it would be a Partner Showcase or...

The post Rumor: Nintendo Direct happening by mid-June appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Tomb Raider: Definitive Edition gets TressFX update on Nintendo Switch 2

Aspyr lived up to its promise to update the Nintendo Switch 2 version of Tomb Raider: Definitive Edition, as a patch has just been released which adds TressFX. The inclusion of TressFX was one of the biggest player requests from the port. Up until today, it was missing in the game. TressFX is notable since it’s used to render and...

The post Tomb Raider: Definitive Edition gets TressFX update on Nintendo Switch 2 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Dark Scrolls receives Nintendo Switch release date, new trailer [update: delayed]

May 5: Just after it was announced not too long ago, Devolver Digital and Doinksoft have nailed down the release date for Dark Scrolls. The game is hitting Nintendo Switch on May 28, 2026. Dark Scrolls, a retro-styled dungeon scroller that combines those good good arcade vibes with handcrafted, roguelike-powered progression, was only revealed about a month ago. The project...

The post Dark Scrolls receives Nintendo Switch release date, new trailer [update: delayed] appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
The Adventures of Elliot producer comments on Zelda comparisons

Since its reveal, The Adventures of Elliot: Millennium Tales, which launches for Nintendo Switch 2 on June 17, has often been compared to the Legend of Zelda series, especially the top-down entries, largely due to similarities in its gameplay style. In an interview with JP Games, producer Naofumi Matsushita addressed those comparisons with a neutral reaction, while also revealing that...

The post The Adventures of Elliot producer comments on Zelda comparisons appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Yoshi and the Mysterious Book developer finally revealed

Just a couple of days before the launch of Yoshi and the Mysterious Book, we finally have confirmation about the developer behind the game. This may not come as much of a surprise, but it was indeed Good-Feel who developed the project. Good-Feel being the developer of Yoshi and the Mysterious Book is something that fans had already speculated on....

The post Yoshi and the Mysterious Book developer finally revealed appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
